zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Horton於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親John de Horton20歲，母親Alice de St. Peter22歲。他於大約1370年與Agnes Byrches在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1413年4月在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Horton于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲John de Horton20岁，母亲Alice de St. Peter22岁。他于大约1370年与Agnes Byrches在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1413年4月在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Horton was born about 1330, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Horton, was 20 and his mother, Alice de St. Peter, was 22. He married Agnes Byrches about 1370, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in April 1413, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Horton est né environ 1330, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Horton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice de St. Peter, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Byrches environ 1370, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en avril 1413, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Horton um 1330 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Horton 20 und seine Mutter Alice de St. Peter 22. Er hat um 1370 in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Byrches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im April 1413 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Horton è nato il circa 1330 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Horton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice de St. Peter, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Byrches circa 1370, nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel aprile 1413, nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Hortonが約1330年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Hortonは20歳，母Alice de St. Peterは22歳であった。約1370年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーでAgnes Byrchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1413年4月にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Horton(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Horton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de St. Peter(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 Agnes Byrches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1413년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Horton nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Horton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice de St. Peter, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Byrches aproximadamente 1370, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em abril de 1413, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Horton родился около 1330 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Horton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de St. Peter, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Byrches около 1370 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер апрель 1413 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Horton nació aproximadamente 1330, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Horton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice de St. Peter, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes Byrches aproximadamente 1370, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en abril de 1413, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
